body:
Suresh bhai, corporate thali package ke liye rough structure ready kar diya:
• 50+ covers: ₹149/head, 2-dish rotation + rice
• 100+ covers: ₹129/head, dedicated delivery window 12–1:30pm
• Setup: 1-day advance order, payment post-delivery for empanelled companies

Aapka 45% delivery share already hai — 3 nearby IT parks mein direct BD karna easy hoga. Want me to draft the outreach kit (PDF + intro message)? Reply YES.
rationale: Merchant showed explicit planning intent for corporate thali; delivering a concrete, ready-to-act package spec with pricing tiers anchored to their delivery data (45% share) plus a single-binary CTA to unlock the next step.

body:
Padma, kids summer yoga camp — here's a starter structure:
• Age groups: 5–9 and 10–14 (separate batches)
• Duration: 6 weeks, Mon–Sat 8:30–9:15am
• Price: ₹2,499 for full camp | ₹499 trial week
• Cap: 12 kids/batch (your studio fits this comfortably)

May–June window is ideal — school summer holidays start around May 15 in Chennai. Your 55% trial-to-paid rate means the trial week will convert well. Want me to draft the WhatsApp announcement for your existing member families? YES/STOP
rationale: Merchant explicitly asked what a kids yoga program should look like; delivering a concrete, actionable structure with pricing, timing, and batch sizing tailored to their studio capacity and Chennai school calendar.

body: Hi Aditya! Karim's Salon ki taraf se — aapka kal ka appointment confirm hai 🙂 Koi specific service chahiye toh bata dein aage se — Karim bhai sab ready rakhenge.
rationale: Simple appointment-eve reminder for a lapsed-hard customer; warm, brief, no pressure — the goal is showing up reliability to rebuild the relationship.

body: Riya ji, kal ke appointment ki yaad dila rahi hoon! Beauty Lounge by Renu mein aapka slot ready hai. Koi extra service add karni ho toh pehle bata dein — time adjust kar lenge 😊
rationale: Appointment reminder for an active Hindi-speaking customer; Hindi-first, warm tone, light upsell invite without pressure.

body:
Ramesh ji, summer shelf check — magicpin data April 2026 se: ORS demand +40%, sunscreen +38%, antifungal +45%. Cold/cough -60% (clear the shelf space).

Aapke paas 240 chronic Rx customers hain — unhe ORS home delivery proactively offer karna make sense hai. Want me to draft a WhatsApp blast for your regulars?
rationale: Sharing specific seasonal demand data (source-cited) with a concrete shelf action, personalised to their 240 chronic Rx customer base; open-ended CTA appropriate for an info + opportunity trigger.

body: Meera, IDA Delhi chapter aaj shaam 7pm — Dr. R. Mehta on digital impressions (Primescan 2, Trios 5, CAD/CAM ROI). 2 CDE credits, free for IDA members. Worth 90 min if you're considering upgrading your impression workflow. Want me to send you the registration link?
rationale: Low-urgency CDE opportunity; peer-clinical tone, specific speaker and topics cited, specific credit count — curiosity + reciprocity lever. Open-ended CTA fits informational trigger.

body: Namaste Mr. Sharma! Apollo Health Plus se — aapki metformin, atorvastatin aur telmisartan ka stock 28 April ke aas paas khatam hoga. Delivery address saved hai aapka — kal subah bhej dein? Reply YES karein toh kal morning delivery confirm kar dete hain. 🙏
rationale: Chronic refill reminder with exact molecule list and near-exact run-out date; senior citizen customer with Hindi preference and saved delivery address — binary YES makes it frictionless.

body: Hi Vivaan! Bright Smile Dental here — just checking in to confirm your follow-up appointment is on track. Dr. Sameer has a few slots open this week. Would you like to confirm a time?
rationale: Placeholder trigger with limited payload data; sending a light, friendly follow-up check-in for a new patient — open-ended to allow the customer to specify their need.

body:
Meera, quick heads-up — Smile Studio opened 1.3km away (Apr 8), running Dental Cleaning @ ₹199. Worth knowing.

Your edge: 540 patients YTD, 4+ years reputation in Lajpat Nagar, Dr. Meera naam par trust. Your ₹299 cleaning includes fluoride + charting — theirs doesn't say. Want me to draft a short GBP post that highlights what your cleaning includes vs a basic clean? Reply YES.
rationale: Competitor alert with specific data (name, distance, price, date); frames differentiation through the merchant's proven strengths rather than price-matching; binary CTA to convert into a concrete action.

body: Suresh bhai, competitor alert — ek nayi South Indian cafe nearby open hui hai. Aapka 42% repeat customer rate aur 4,200 unique YTD strong base hai. Suggest: ek 'regulars only' loyalty perk — ek free filter coffee after every 10 thalis. Want me to set it up on your magicpin page? YES/STOP
rationale: Competitor alert with a concrete loyalty counter-move anchored in their strong repeat rate (42%); loss aversion + effort externalization lever.

body: Lakshmi, quick question — this week at Studio11, kaunsi service ki demand sabse zyada hai? Haircuts, colour, hair spa, ya kuch aur? (3 seconds reply karein — planning mein help milegi 🙂)
rationale: Curious-ask trigger using the asking-the-merchant lever; light, specific, easy to answer — builds engagement cadence and generates useful intel for future personalisation.

body: Suresh bhai, ek quick question — is week aapka sabse popular dish ya combo kaunsa raha? (dine-in + delivery dono mein). 2-second reply, planning ke liye useful hai 👍
rationale: Curious-ask to engage the merchant and gather menu intelligence; Hindi-English mix matching merchant's language, minimal ask, easy reply.

body: Hi Rashmi! It's been 57 days since your last session at PowerHouse — you'd built 5 months of consistency, which is no small thing. Whenever you're ready to restart, your weight-loss program history is still here and Dr. Karthik can pick up right where you left off. We have weekday evening slots open this week. Just reply YES and we'll block one for you — no sign-up needed.
rationale: Lapsed-hard win-back for a weight-loss customer; acknowledges their prior commitment (5 months, 57 days gap) instead of generic pitch; frictionless YES re-entry with evening preference honored.

body: Hi Reyansh! Dr. Asha's clinic here — it's been a while since your last visit. Your 6-month dental check-up is likely due. We have slots open this week, including evenings. Want me to block one for you? Reply YES and we'll confirm.
rationale: Recall outreach for a churned patient; clinical-peer tone, low-friction binary CTA, no over-selling — just a direct re-activation nudge.

body: Namaste Reyansh! Daily Care Medicos ki taraf se — thodi der ho gayi aapki last visit ke baad. Koi regular medicines ya health products chahiye ho toh hum home delivery bhi karte hain. Koi zaroorat ho toh batayein? 🙏
rationale: Lapsed customer re-engagement with hi-en mix language; warm, non-pushy, highlights home delivery as low-friction reactivation path.

body:
Anjali, it's been 38 days — wanted to check in. Last time we talked about renewal; I won't push that again today.

Quick fact instead: since your subscription lapsed, 180 of your 380 YTD customers are now 90+ days without a visit. That's a retention window that closes fast in salons. Want me to send you the list of which customers are most likely to respond to a simple recall message? No subscription needed to see it — just reply YES.
rationale: Dormant merchant re-engagement; avoids repeating the subscription pitch that failed last time; leads with a concrete loss-aversion data point (180 lapsing customers) and offers value-first with no commitment required.

body: Anand bhai, thodi der ho gayi baat kiye! IPL season chal raha hai — aapke cafe ke paas match night combo try kar sakte hain (weeknight matches +18% covers drive karte hain, magicpin data Apr 2026). Chaiye, chai-samosa combo, match-screen setup? Quick: is week kaunse din aapka footfall zyada rehta hai?
rationale: Re-engaging a dormant merchant with a timely, curiosity-driven hook (IPL match night data); asking-the-merchant lever to restart the conversation.

body:
Lakshmi, Diwali is 188 days out — salons that pre-book bridal and party packages in May-June fill their October slots 3x faster than those who start in September. Your 1,150 YTD customers include 220 who haven't been back in 90+ days — perfect Diwali pre-book targets.

Want me to draft a Diwali pre-booking campaign (message + offer) you can send to that 220-customer segment? Reply YES.
rationale: Festival trigger converted into a concrete early-mover advantage with social proof framing; targets the specific lapsed-customer segment (220) as the most valuable audience.

body: Pooja, festival season mein gyms see a spike in 'get-fit-before-Diwali' enquiries — usually Sep-Oct. Your 387 YTD member base is a good starting point for a pre-festival challenge (6-week challenge, starts Sep 1). Want me to draft the campaign outline so it's ready to go? YES/STOP
rationale: Festival trigger → pre-emptive campaign planning with effort externalization; binary CTA converts the low-urgency trigger into an actionable commitment.

body:
Vikas bhai, Sunrise Medicos ka Google Business Profile abhi unverified hai — verified pharmacies ko avg 30% more views milte hain (magicpin benchmark). Verification ka process: Google postcard ya phone call, takes 3-5 days.

Main aapko step-by-step guide kar sakti hoon — abhi 10 min mein start ho sakta hai. Reply YES karein?
rationale: GBP verification nudge with concrete uplift stat (30%); effort externalization (I'll guide you step-by-step); binary YES for immediate action.

body:
Suresh bhai, DC vs MI aaj Arun Jaitley Stadium — 7:30pm. Magicpin data: weeknight IPL matches drive +18% restaurant covers vs average. Aapka Buy 1 Get 1 pizza (Tue-Thu) is already live — push an IPL combo: ₹349 for 1 large pizza + 2 drinks, delivery in 30 min.

Want me to post it on your magicpin page right now? Reply YES — done in 2 min.
rationale: High-urgency real-time trigger (match in hours); cites exact match data, existing offer, and constructs a specific combo price; effort externalization with a 2-minute promise.

body:
Suresh bhai, aap 5 reviews se 150 milestone touch karne wale ho! 🎉 145 ho gaye.

Ye moment ko use karo: ek Google Post aaj daalo — '150 reviews ka jashan! Puri week thali ₹129 milegi regulars ke liye.' 150 touch hote hi I'll send you the celebratory post draft. Chalega?
rationale: Imminent milestone (5 away); combines celebration anticipation with a specific promotional idea to convert the momentum into a business action.

body: Mukesh bhai, congratulations on hitting a milestone! 🎉 Aapka magicpin profile strong ho raha hai. Is momentum ko aage badhate hain — ek Google Post aur ek active offer add karein toh reviews aur aayenge. Want me to draft both in 5 min? Reply YES.
rationale: Milestone celebration → immediate pivot to next action (GBP post + offer activation); effort externalization with 5-minute promise.

body:
Bharat, aapki calls 7 din mein 50% giri hain (baseline: 12 calls/week, now ~6). 3 compounding issues: profile unverified, no active offers, last Vera chat 14 days back.

Fastest fix that I can do in 30 min: activate 'Free Consultation' offer + add 1 GBP post. Subscription renews in 12 days — fixing visibility now makes that renewal worth it. Reply YES aur main abhi start karta hoon.
rationale: High-urgency perf dip with exact numbers; diagnoses root causes, proposes a fast concrete fix, and ties renewal value to the fix — loss aversion + effort externalization.

body:
Sushma, aapke calls mein recent dip aaya hai. Subscription bhi expire ho chuka hai — jo bhi traction tha uska asar dikha raha hai.

Ek quick win: Haircut @ ₹99 offer activate karein (aapke peer salons mein yahi top-converting offer hai Pune mein). Main 3 min mein set kar sakti hoon. Reply YES?
rationale: Perf dip + expired subscription; leads with the immediate fix (peer-validated offer) rather than harping on the problem; effort externalization.

body:
Padma, calls this week +15% vs baseline — likely the kids yoga post (that content is working). Your trial-to-paid rate is already 55% — above category avg.

Strike while it's hot: want me to draft 3 more kids-yoga content pieces (WhatsApp + GBP posts) to keep the momentum going this month? Reply YES.
rationale: Perf spike with identified driver; celebrates + immediately pivots to capitalizing on the momentum with specific next action — social proof (55% trial-to-paid) reinforces the value.

body: Vikas bhai, is week views aur calls dono mein uptick aaya hai — kuch kaam kar raha hai. Ek suggestion: is momentum ko aur badhaane ke liye aapka GBP verify karwa lein (abhi unverified hai — verified pharmacies ko 30% more views milte hain). 10 min ka kaam hai. Reply YES?
rationale: Perf spike → pivot to the biggest unresolved blocker (unverified GBP); uses the momentum as a motivating hook for an action they've been avoiding.

body:
Hi Priya, Dr. Meera's clinic ki taraf se 🦷 6-month cleaning due ho gayi hai — last cleaning May 12 thi. Aapke liye 2 slots ready hain:
→ Wed 5 Nov, 6pm
→ Thu 6 Nov, 5pm

Dental Cleaning @ ₹299 + complimentary fluoride. Reply 1 for Wednesday, 2 for Thursday, ya koi aur time batayein.
rationale: Recall reminder matching the gold-standard example from the brief; exact date, exact slots, catalog price, hi-en mix matching Priya's language preference, weekday evening slots honoring her preference.

body: Hi Diya! Zen Yoga Studio here — it's been a while since your last class. We'd love to have you back 🙏 We have slots this week, including mornings and evenings. Would you like to restart with a class this week? Reply YES and we'll confirm a time that works.
rationale: Lapsed-soft customer recall for a yoga studio; warm, low-pressure English tone, binary YES makes re-entry frictionless.

body:
Meera, DCI circular just dropped — radiograph dose limits change Dec 15: max per IOPA drops 1.5→1.0 mSv. E-speed film passes at the new limit; D-speed does not. Digital RVG sensors unaffected.

Action before Dec 15: audit your X-ray setup, document E-speed or RVG in your SOPs. I can draft a quick compliance checklist for your staff. Reply YES to get it — deadline is Dec 15.
rationale: High-urgency compliance trigger with exact regulation numbers (source: DCI circular 2026-11-04); clinical peer tone with specific technical detail; effort externalization (compliance checklist drafted for them).
